brief_notes: Excellent molecular biology paper with comprehensive ribosome profiling data. Tables quantify footprint distributions, TE ranges, KEGG pathway enrichments with fold-enrichment and p-values, DTT counts with functional categories, 5' leader/CDS density ratios, upstream AUG accumulation scores, and transgenic reporter ANOVA results. The mechanistic progression from genome-wide to cell-type to mechanism is well-structured.
